summary: Spot DEXs are a maturing, multi-chain market. As of mid-June 2026, monthly on-chain spot DEX volume runs at roughly $210B+ (DefiLlama 30d total ~$213B, though a recent prediction-market/Polymarket spike inflates 24h figures), and the DEX-to-CEX spot volume ratio has hit record highs (~29% in 2026 per Phemex/The Block, up from ~21% in Nov 2025 and the low-teens in 2023). By 30-day spot volume the leaders are the Uniswap family (V4 ~$24.6B + V3 ~$16.9B + V2), PancakeSwap (AMM V3 ~$18.6B + Infinity ~$4.9B), and Aerodrome Slipstream on Base (~$17.5B). By TVL the order is Uniswap (~$3.1B aggregated), PancakeSwap (~$2.2B), and Curve (~$1.46B). Solana hosts a dense long tail of high-volume venues (Orca, Raydium, Meteora, plus newer SolFi/HumidiFi/Tessera) routed largely through the Jupiter aggregator (~$19.7B 30d agg volume, dominant Solana routing). Newer designs Fluid DEX (smart-debt/smart-collateral, ~$5.3B 30d) and on-chain orderbooks (Hyperliquid spot ~$6.5B 30d) are climbing. Aggregators are a parallel leadership stack led by Jupiter, then KyberSwap, OKX Swap, 0x, CoWSwap and 1inch.

leaders.name: Uniswap (V2/V3/V4)
leaders.chain: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, OP Mainnet, Polygon (43+ chains)
leaders.note: Overall #1 DEX by combined volume and TVL. V4 (hooks/singleton) is now the largest single deployment by volume; V3 still very large; V2 persists. Held ~36% spot DEX market share in Aug 2025 (CoinGecko).

leaders.name: PancakeSwap
leaders.chain: BSC (primary), Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, zkSync, Polygon zkEVM
leaders.note: Closest rival to Uniswap; #2 by both volume and TVL. PancakeSwap Infinity (CLMM, launched late 2025) is taking share from V3. Reportedly led Uniswap on full-year 2025 trading volume (~$1.2T, Token Terminal).

leaders.name: Aerodrome (Slipstream + V1)
leaders.note: Dominant DEX on Base, ~half of Base DEX volume/TVL. ve(3,3) model evolved from Velodrome. In Nov 2025 Dromos Labs announced merging Aerodrome and Velodrome into a unified 'Aero' DEX with EVM extensions (incl. Circle's Arc).

leaders.name: Curve
leaders.chain: Ethereum (primary), 30 chains incl. OP, Gnosis, Avalanche, Arbitrum
leaders.note: Stableswap specialist; lowest slippage on large stablecoin/pegged swaps. Pioneered veCRV vote-locking ('Curve Wars'). Was a top-3 TVL DEX in 2021-2023; now #3 by TVL, smaller in raw volume.

leaders.name: Hyperliquid Spot Orderbook
leaders.note: On-chain central-limit orderbook DEX. Hyperliquid was the breakout venue of 2025 (perps dominance ~80%, ~$800M+ annual revenue) and its spot orderbook now ranks among the largest non-AMM DEXs.

leaders.name: Fluid DEX
leaders.chain: Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, Base (expanding to Solana)
leaders.note: Instadapp's capital-efficient 'smart debt / smart collateral' DEX integrated with lending. Fast riser in 2025; bridged FLUID to Solana (Sept 2025) and partnered with Jupiter on Jupiter Lend.

leaders.name: Orca
leaders.note: Leading Solana concentrated-liquidity AMM (Whirlpools). Among the highest-volume Solana venues, primarily filled via Jupiter routing.

leaders.name: Raydium
leaders.note: Long-standing Solana AMM; benefited from the 2024-2025 Pump.fun memecoin boom, briefly topping Uniswap on weekly volume in early 2025 before reverting. Highest TVL of the Solana-native AMMs.

leaders.name: Meteora
leaders.note: Solana dynamic liquidity market maker (DLMM); core memecoin/long-tail liquidity venue, routed heavily through Jupiter.

leaders.name: Jupiter (aggregator)
leaders.note: Dominant Solana DEX aggregator and DeFi super-app (swaps, perps, lend). Not an AMM itself but the primary execution path that routes into Raydium/Orca/Meteora/SolFi. #1 aggregator by far.

leaders.name: Balancer
leaders.note: Flexible weighted/boosted pools and a key 2021-2022 liquidity venue; now a niche/mid-tier player well behind the volume and TVL leaders.

leadership_shift: 2021 (DeFi summer peak): Uniswap was the clear #1 spot DEX, with SushiSwap (a Uniswap fork) as the main challenger and Curve/Balancer dominating stablecoin and weighted-pool TVL; Uniswap's daily volume ran ~4x SushiSwap's. 2023 (bear market): the top tier consolidated to Uniswap, Curve, SushiSwap, plus dYdX and 0x; daily DEX volume averaged ~$4B and DEX/CEX spot ratio sat in the low teens. SushiSwap faded; Curve remained a TVL pillar despite the 2022-2023 turmoil. 2024-2025: explosive diversification away from Ethereum monoculture - PancakeSwap rose to rival Uniswap (and reportedly led on full-year 2025 volume); Aerodrome became the dominant DEX on Base; the Solana stack (Raydium, Orca, Meteora) surged on the Pump.fun memecoin cycle with Jupiter as the routing layer; and Hyperliquid emerged as the breakout on-chain orderbook (perps + spot) and a top revenue generator. Now (mid-2026): Uniswap remains overall #1 by combined volume and TVL but no longer dominant - PancakeSwap and Aerodrome are genuine peers on volume, Curve still anchors stablecoin TVL, and newer designs (Fluid's smart-debt DEX, on-chain orderbooks like Hyperliquid) plus an expanding Solana long tail are reshaping the field. Structurally, the DEX-to-CEX spot ratio has hit record highs (~29% in 2026, up from ~21% in Nov 2025), signaling a durable shift of spot activity on-chain.
